title: About us
body: "The Office for Investment: Financial Services (OfI:FS) is a dedicated concierge service within the Office for Investment.  By bringing together the different elements of the UK ecosystem, including the regulatory bodies, the OfI:FS offers comprehensive and bespoke support in a structured, co-ordinated way to firms looking to establish and expand their presence in the UK.  Our team of financial services experts operates in partnership with:      HM Treasury   Financial Conduct Authority   Prudential Regulation Authority   City of London Corporation    We are focused on increasing the attractiveness of the UK’s financial services sector and supporting firms in navigating the regulatory landscape. This supports the Office for Investment’s wider objectives of securing investment that drives growth, job creation and increased productivity across the UK.  "
